category_sources: source_facts.description identifies clusterctl as part of Cluster API work.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Cluster API documentation site.
display_name_sources: Official Cluster API documentation uses clusterctl as the command name.
docs_sources: Official Cluster API documentation has a dedicated clusterctl overview page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/cluster-api, so repo was returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Cluster Management API work.
source_facts.executables lists clusterctl as a CLI executable.
